headline: Navy Sec Phelan PEACES OUT 💨🚢 IMMEDIATELY - Alpha Chad Cao INCOMING 🐺🔥
text:
US Navy Secretary John Phelan 🚢💼 just GOT THE BOOT 👢🚪 'effective IMMEDIATELY' 😱💨, Pentagon spokesman Sean Parnell 📱🗣️ SPILLED the tea ☕ on socials! Latest high-rank MILITARY CUCK 🐔📉 to BOUNCE from Trump admin amid US-Israel IRAN WAR 🔥🇮🇷🚀 and STRAIT OF HORMUZ BLOCKADE ⛓️🌊 – ships SEIZED by mullahs 😈⚓ but Trump says 'KEEP IT LOCKED' 🔒🇺🇸! Navy Undersec Hung Cao 🐺🇻🇳, 25-yr VET SLAYER 💪⚔️ who ROASTED DEI WOKE BS 🤡🌈 in VA Senate run vs Tim Kaine 💙😴, STEPPING UP as ACTING DADDY 👑🚢 – dude wants ALPHA MALES/FEMALES 🦁🦁 ripping GUTS OUT 🩸🍖 and BEGGING for SECONDS 😤🏋️ to WIN WARS 💥🎖️!

Phelan, CIVVY BUSINESS BRO 🤑💰 who BANKROLLED Trump's campaign 🗽🍊 and POSED at Mar-a-Lago 🏖️👨‍👨‍👦 with Don announcing TRUMP-NAMED BATTLESHIPS 🚢🍊 in 'GOLDEN FLEET' ✨⚓ glow-up – but NO REASON DROPPED for his EXIT 🚪🤷‍♂️! Comes WEEKS after Pete Hegseth 🔥🪖 AXED Army Chief Randy George 📉👋, plus Gen David Hodne & Maj Gen William Green 🪓💥 – Hegseth's FIRED DOZENS of TOP BRASS 🎖️🔥 including Naval Ops Chief & Air Force Vice 💨🛩️! Sec role? POLICY FORMING 📜, RECRUITING ALPHAS 🧑‍💻🔥, TRAINING BEASTS 🏋️‍♂️⚔️, BUDGET BALLER 💰📊, SHIP BUILDING/REPAIR 🏗️🚢 – Phelan sworn in MARCH 2025 after '24 NOM 🍊✅.

Andrew Peek 🕵️‍♂️ ex-State DEPT insider spilling: Trump WANTED merchant fleet EXPANSION 🚢📈 but NO MOVES = PHELAN TAKES THE L 🤦‍♂️💥 (30% fault), other 70%? SWAP for MAGA FAVE like Cao whom Don LIKES/TRUSTS MORE ❤️🔒 – BASE GOING WILD 🐸📣! Meanwhile, Trump blockade on IRAN PORTS HOLDS FIRM ⛓️🇮🇷 amid CEASEFIRE 'FRAUD' 😂✋, clashes in HORMUZ OIL CHOKER 🌊🛢️ – Iran chief Ghalibaf 😡🕌 cries 'NO RE-OPEN' cuz US/Israel 'VIOLATING' 🤪🚫! WH babe Karoline Leavitt 💋📢 says Prez 'SATISFIED' 😏👍 with naval SQUEEZE, Iran WEAK AF 🐱💦. Hegseth CLEANING HOUSE 🧹🔥 for ALPHA NAVY 2.0 🐺🚢 – Phelan's out, Cao's THRONED 👑, TRUMP FLEET COMING BRRRR 💨📈‼️!
